rows.content: DEFAULT SEARCH PATH+  Displays the value set in the SPFPATH environment
variable. If SPFPATH is not present, it displays the same value as
EXECUTABLE PATH+  Displays the path where SPF/PC.EXE file was found.
GENERAL PROFILE, TABLE, AND KEYBOARD SEARCH PATH+  This is the directory
(or directories) in which all profile and table based options are
found (and altered). When storing a new profile (or option), the data
is always stored in the first directory in the path.
MACRO AND COMMAND PROCEDURE SEARCH PATH+  This is the directory (or
directories) where all ISREDIT macros and ISPEXEC procedures are
PANEL AND MESSAGE SEARCH PATH+  This is the directory (or directories)
where all panel and message definition files are stored.
